## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file in .github directory
- [ ] Scaffold the Next.js project
- [ ] Customize for university website
- [ ] Install required extensions
- [ ] Compile and install dependencies
- [ ] Create and run task
- [ ] Launch the project
- [ ] Verify documentation

## Project Overview

**Type:** Next.js Full-Stack Application
**Purpose:** University Website Portal
**Features:** Student portal, course catalog, admissions features, responsive design
